name: Fairies Love
short_description: This is a casual gentleman game with exquisite characters. Go on adventures and get to know six different girls with unique personalities. Faced with their challenges, what choices will you make to let them become your girlfriends successfully?
detailed_description:
Game Overview
When you find yourself in a paradise, you will encounter not only beautiful scenery but also many fairy girls who have never seen the outside world. They have a great interest in you, this special guest...

Product Features
A special puzzle elimination game. By collecting specified color balls, you can increase the favorability of the fairies. After successfully clearing the levels, fairies with various attributes are looking forward to meeting you!

Six vibrant Liv2D girls ♥
The adventures and stories of six girls
♥CG album mode♥

Our upcoming versions are still in development. Your support would be our greatest motivation for the updates!
